incidents.description: Customers report order submission failing since ~09:10. Error banner says 'something went wrong'. Support queue filling up. Please investigate urgently.

incidents.short_description: Orders failing with HTTP 500 on checkout
incidents.description: Duplicate reports from EU support: POST /orders 500s on checkout-api starting shortly after 09:10.

incidents.short_description: payments-api intermittent failures, card charges not completing
incidents.description: Payment capture step timing out intermittently since 08:55. Roughly 30% of attempts fail then succeed on retry.
